meaning: n.存款,挽救,救助,节约adj.搭救的,挽救的,节约的,节俭的,保留的,补偿的 prep.除...之外,考虑到
examples: The houses will boast the latest energy-saving technology.
Many factories are so antiquated they are not worth saving.
I'm not very good at saving.
But Mr Impey said despite budgets being squeezed he still believed people were interested in saving buildings.
The BBC Trust document was its final report into cost-saving plans known internally as "Delivering Quality First".
